description: Product Description Your Skin Barrier Complex Be kind to your skin and treat yourself with our Ceramides Routine gift set. Ideal for sensitive skin. Formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking hyaluronic acid, hydrating Vitamin E and skin soothing Oats, our Ceramide range helps soothe and strengthen the skin barrier to prevent moisture loss. Give your skin the extra care it deserves! Vegan Friendly & Fragrance Free Ingredients Face Facts Ceramide Sheet Mask | Hydrates + Soothes | 1 Treatment Aqua, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Betaine, Ceramide NP, Ceramide AS, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Avena Sativa (Oat) Peptide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Leuconostoc / Radish Root Ferment Lysate Filtrate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Yeast Extract, Allantoin, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Polyglyceryl-10 Stearate, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Disodium EDTA, Beta-Glucan, Ethyl Acetate, Cyclohexane Face Facts Ceramide Gel Cream | Moisturising | Soothes + Strengthens Skin | 50ml Aqua, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Stearic Acid, Ceramide NP, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Benzoate, Cyclohexane, Disodium EDTA, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Castor Oil Hydrogenated Ethoxylated, Butylene Glycol Face Facts Ceramide Eye Cream | Replenishing | Reduces Puffiness + Dark Circles | 15ml Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Ceramide NP, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Benzoate, Cyclohexane, Disodium EDTA, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Castor Oil Hydrogenated Ethoxylated, Butylene Glycol Face Facts Ceramide Repairing Serum | Repairs + Hydrates Skin | 30ml Aqua, Glyceryl Stearate, Butylene Glycol, Erythritol, Fructooligosaccharides, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Ceramide NP, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Tocopherol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, C14-22 Alcohols, PEG-100 Stearate, Sodium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Caprylyl Methicone, Sodium Benzoate, C12-20 Alkyl Glucoside, C30-45 Alkyl Cetearyl Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Isohexadecane, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Phenoxyethanol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Propylene Glycol, Castor Oil Hydrogenated Ethoxylated, Ethylhexylglycerin Safety Warning Face Facts Ceramide Sheet Mask | Hydrates + Soothes For external use only, do not ingest. Use within 15 minutes of opening. Do not use on irritated or broken skin. Do not use on open wounds, cuts or grazes. In the unlikely event you may suffer an adverse reaction to this product, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice. If product gets into eyes, flush with clean water. Keep out of the sight & reach of children. Please retain information for future reference. Face Facts Ceramide Gel Cream | Moisturising | Soothes + Strengthens Skin | 50ml For external use only. Do not apply to irritated or broken skin. We recommend you test on a small area first to ensure there is no reaction. In the unlikely event that redness or skin irritation occurs, stop using and seek medical advice if needed. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse well with lukewarm water and seek medical advice if needed. Keep out of the reach of children. Please retain information for future reference. Face Facts Ceramide Eye Cream | Replenishing | Reduces Puffiness + Dark Circles | 15ml For external use only. Do not apply to irritated or broken skin. We recommend you test on a small area first to ensure there is no reaction. In the unlikely event that redness or skin irritation occurs, stop using and seek medical advice if needed. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse well with lukewarm water and seek medical advice if needed. Keep out of the reach of children. Please retain information for future reference. Face Facts Ceramide Repairing Serum | Repairs + Hydrates Skin | 30ml For external use only. Do not apply to irritated or broken skin. We recommend you test on a small area first to ensure there is no reaction. In the unlikely event that redness or skin irritation occurs, stop using and seek medical advice if needed. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse well with lukewarm water and seek medical advice if needed. Keep out of the reach of children. Please retain information for future reference. See more
